proc texture(self: MTLRenderPassAttachmentDescriptor): MTLTexture {.inline,
    ...raises: [], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc texture2DDescriptorWithPixelFormat(class: typedesc[MTLTextureDescriptor];
                                        x: MTLPixelFormat; width: uint;
                                        height: uint; mipmapped: bool): MTLTextureDescriptor {.
    inline.}
Source   Edit   
proc usage(self: MTLTextureDescriptor): MTLTextureUsage {.inline, ...raises: [],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc vertexFunction(self: MTLRenderPipelineDescriptor): MTLFunction {.inline,
    ...raises: [], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit  

Converters

    forbids: [].}
Converts CAMetalLayer to its CALayer base type. Source   Edit

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Converts the render encoder to its command-encoder base type. Source   Edit
